intro:
A side-scrolling action game with simple controls!
Dodge obstacles and aim for the greatest distance!
Master Perfect Dodges to fly even farther!?
description:
In this game, you ride the Momonga Robo and soar through the skies in a side-scrolling 2D action adventure.

[Game Mode]

Stages are generated randomly one after another.
Challenge yourself to see how long you can keep flying and aim for a high score.

Each stage features unique gimmicks.
Touching enemies or obstacles such as rocks and trees will cause damage or slow you down.

On the screen, you’ll see:
•An Energy Gauge required for flight
•An HP stock that decreases when you take damage
•A Dodge Gauge that is consumed when you dodge

Collect snacks that appear during stages to restore your Energy Gauge.

The game ends if your HP reaches 0 or if the Momonga Robo falls off the bottom of the screen.

[How to Play]
•Press the A Button to ascend. Release it to descend.
•When the Dodge Gauge is full, press L / R / ZL / ZR Buttons to dodge.
•After dodging, you must wait for a short cooldown before dodging again.
•Performing a Perfect Dodge does not consume the Dodge Gauge.

An endless action game with simple controls!
Even if you fail, you can jump right back in and try again!
